title: Focus on women: Rise above your fears, says Speaker
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"WOMEN'S MONTH NEWS - She's recently turned 40 years young, she's a wife and a mother to a fur baby, and, in 2021, she became the first female Speaker of the Mossel Bay Municipal Council.","html":"WOMEN'S MONTH NEWS - She's recently turned 40 years young, she's a wife and a mother to a fur baby, and, in 2021, she became the first female Speaker of the Mossel Bay Municipal Council."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Furthermore, Speaker Venolea Fortuin describes herself as a community activist at heart, a representative of a political party, a rugby fanatic, and someone who doesn't shy away from difficult situations.","html":"Furthermore, Speaker Venolea Fortuin describes herself as a community activist at heart, a representative of a political party, a rugby fanatic, and someone who doesn't shy away from difficult situations."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Women's Day to Fortuin means more than the commemoration of the day and celebrating those who have paved the way. \"It is a reminder that our existence matters.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She says it's a pause to reflect and honour for one day, but to then grab the opportunities of the next 12 months to effect change where it matters.","html":"She says it's a pause to reflect and honour for one day, but to then grab the opportunities of the next 12 months to effect change where it matters."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I come from humble beginnings, being raised by both parents with the minimum. No material overflow, but an abundance of love and teachings about humility.\"","html":"\"I come from humble beginnings, being raised by both parents with the minimum. No material overflow, but an abundance of love and teachings about humility.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her greatest inspiration was her late mother, Paulina James. \"I could not understand when I was just a mere girl, how she could carry so many others and still be a perfect mum. I got that gift from her.\"","html":"Her greatest inspiration was her late mother, Paulina James. \"I could not understand when I was just a mere girl, how she could carry so many others and still be a perfect mum. I got that gift from her.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Former mayor Marie Ferreira is another. \"She believed in me and she gave me an opportunity at a time when it was unpopular to do so. Ever since, I have grown into a better equipped public representative.\"","html":"Former mayor Marie Ferreira is another. \"She believed in me and she gave me an opportunity at a time when it was unpopular to do so. Ever since, I have grown into a better equipped public representative.\""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Fortuin says her greatest achievement thus far has been the opportunity to serve as a public representative for three consecutive terms."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"During my first term in 2012 and 2014, I featured as a young political leader in two publications by Gender Links for Equality and Justice.\"","html":"\"During my first term in 2012 and 2014, I featured as a young political leader in two publications by Gender Links for Equality and Justice.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Naturally, being in the public domain comes with both the good and the bad, but she says she has managed to keep a balance through her values and faith.","html":"Naturally, being in the public domain comes with both the good and the bad, but she says she has managed to keep a balance through her values and faith."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For women, fear of daring to be different and changing the conversations to influence change can come from places of non-recognition, resentment, humiliation, being broken down and more.","html":"For women, fear of daring to be different and changing the conversations to influence change can come from places of non-recognition, resentment, humiliation, being broken down and more."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I want to encourage all of us to rise to our place of overcoming such fears through taking one step at a time, finding yourself in the centre of the rooms where it matters, through humility and your sense of never giving up.\"","html":"\"I want to encourage all of us to rise to our place of overcoming such fears through taking one step at a time, finding yourself in the centre of the rooms where it matters, through humility and your sense of never giving up.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Focus on women: Rise above your fears, says Speaker
